entries.title: Schema drift between CLI/daemon has no automated detection
entries.target: V1.1 — RESOLVED: Added schema-drift-check CI job comparing SCHEMA_VERSION, reference_sources table columns, and LATEST_SCHEMA_VERSION across CLI, daemon, and contracts
entries.closure_note: Added schema-drift-check job to ci.yml with 3 checks: SCHEMA_VERSION consistency (CLI vs daemon), reference_sources key columns (both directions), LATEST_SCHEMA_VERSION match (contracts vs CLI). Fast-failing CI detection.

entries.title: Error code inconsistency between error_code() and Internal code field
entries.target: V1.1 — RESOLVED: Documented two-tier error code strategy in module header and Internal variant doc comment. Internal.code is for internal classification (DATABASE_ERROR, INTERNAL_ERROR), error_code() returns stable public codes (INTERNAL). Documented future direction for finer-grained public codes.
entries.closure_note: Added module-level documentation explaining Internal.code vs error_code() design rationale. Added doc comment on Internal variant explaining code field purpose. Cross-referenced SyncError pattern.

entries.title: Test helper duplication across errors.rs and middleware.rs
entries.target: V1.1 — RESOLVED: Created test_utils.rs module with create_test_workspace() and create_initialized_test_workspace() helpers. Migrated 6 tests (4 from errors.rs, 2 from sync.rs) to use shared helpers. lib.rs exports test_utils under #[cfg(test)].
entries.closure_note: Created crates/nexus42d/src/test_utils.rs with create_test_workspace() returning (TempDir, PathBuf, PathBuf) and create_initialized_test_workspace() returning (TempDir, PathBuf, PathBuf, PathBuf). Migrated errors.rs (4 integration tests) and sync.rs (2 integration tests). Other files can migrate incrementally.
